text.title: eu-ai-act-compliance Procedure
text.summary: Six-step compliance pipeline: classify → docgen → bias-check → explainability → human review → register.

step.name: risk-classification
step.input: System description + deployment context (countries, user types, domain).
step.action: Run classifier subagent (Sonnet) to produce a `risk-classification` report matching the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.
step.decision-gate: If `risk_tier == unacceptable`, HALT — system cannot be deployed in EU. If high, continue full pipeline. If limited, jump to step 4. If minimal, halt with "no further action" note.

step.name: documentation-generation
step.action: Docgen subagent (Sonnet) generates the model card, data sheet, and conformity-assessment draft per Article 11. Flag any missing facts with `[MISSING: reason]`.

step.name: bias-check
step.action: Run Fairlearn / AIF360 bias report on the dataset and model predictions; output JSON bias report.
step.output: Bias report (JSON) attached to the documentation set.

step.name: explainability-or-transparency
step.action: For high-risk: produce SHAP/LIME explanations where model class allows; otherwise document limitations explicitly. For limited-risk: ensure Article 50 transparency disclosures are in place (chatbot identity, deepfake watermarks).
step.output: Explainability section in the docs OR Article 50 disclosure copy.

step.name: human-legal-review
step.action: Reviewer subagent (Opus) cross-checks every citation against the official Act text, flags any unverifiable claims, then HALTS for human legal sign-off.
step.output: Reviewer report + reviewer-signoff block in the risk-classification record.
step.decision-gate: If reviewer flags any hallucinated citation, return to step 2 with the flags. Block until human signs.

step.name: register-and-monitor
step.action: Register the high-risk system in the EU AI database (Article 49). Configure post-market monitoring per Article 72. Set CI gate to re-trigger step 1 on any substantial modification.
step.output: EU database registration ID + monitoring dashboard.
